events.name: Grayson Perry: Smash Hits
events.description: Grayson Perry's major retrospective. Tapestries, ceramics, and prints exploring class, identity and taste.

events.name: James Acaster: Hecklers Welcome
events.description: James Acaster's new show. Apparently he's encouraging heckling this time. Chaos guaranteed.

events.name: Floating Points at Fabric
events.description: Floating Points headlining Room One with a 3-hour set. Support from local selectors.

events.name: Borough Market Supper Club: Spring Edition
events.description: Seasonal tasting menu from three Borough Market traders. Wine pairings included. Limited to 40 seats.

events.name: Hackney Marshes Walk
events.description: Morning walk along the marshes and River Lea. Bring coffee. Optional brunch at The Anchor afterwards.

events.name: Yussef Dayes at O2 Forum
events.description: Yussef Dayes live. Bringing the full band. If you liked Black Focus, this is unmissable.

events.name: Sunday Roast at The Drapers Arms
events.location: The Drapers Arms, Barnsbury Street, Islington
events.description: Proper Sunday roast. Book ahead — this place fills up. Great beer garden if the sun's out.
